query:
SELECT DISTINCT pp.projectId, p.name as projectName, COUNT(*) as renderCount
FROM projectPhotos pp 
JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id 
WHERE pp.subcategory = 'renders' 
GROUP BY pp.projectId, p.name;
command:
